title: Connected
description: Built with the community. For all.
body:
[![Connected Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b7f46e3090d256de308f64ac8f7f20c5e5ed9516.png)](https://discord.gg/Asv7EJSJf5) | World Generation | New Structures | Vanilla Upgrades | | :--- | :--- | :--- | | Tectonic | Towns and Towers | YUNG's Complete Suite | | Geophilic | Dungeons and Taverns | Explorify | | Lithosphere | Structory: Towers | End Remastered | --- ## Deeper systems - Tetra - bascially infinite tool / weapon possibilites - Cold Sweat & Serene Seasons - Seasons & temperature change making you need to adapt and play differently (check bottom of desc) - Many many new mobs - Naturalist, Friends&Foes, Luminous Monsters, and more. --- ## Small overhauls that make a big difference - Built in shader support with Iris + resourcify for easy downloads. - Better sounds with Sound Physics Remastered, Matmos, and Extra Sounds.
⚙️ Optional Server Settings #### Adjust Temperature Difficulty Use a value of `1` to disable, or `0-1` to make it easier. ``` /temp modify @a set heat_dampening true /temp modify @a set cold_dampening true ``` #### Toggle Elytra Firework Boosting ``` /function no_elytra_boosting:settings ```
